zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Welles於1440年11月1日出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯紐可亞斯特爾時，她的父親William Welles30歲，母親Anne Barnewall25歲。她於1464年1月4日與Christopher Plunkett 2nd Baron of Killeen在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯可利可斯托結婚。他們至少是2個女兒的父母。她去世於1506年4月26日在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯奧爾卡斯特爾享年65歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Welles于1440年11月1日出生在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯紐可亞斯特爾时，她的父亲William Welles30岁，母亲Anne Barnewall25岁。她于1464年1月4日与Christopher Plunkett 2nd Baron of Killeen在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯可利可斯托结婚。他们至少是2个女儿的父母。她去世于1506年4月26日在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯奧爾卡斯特爾享年65岁。

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Welles was born on 1 November 1440, in Newcastle, County Meath, Ireland, her father, William Welles, was 30 and her mother, Anne Barnewall, was 25. She married Christopher Plunkett 2nd Baron of Killeen on 4 January 1464, in Crickstown, County Meath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 2 daughters. She died on 26 April 1506, in Oldcastle, County Meath, Ireland, at the age of 65.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Welles est née le 1 novembre 1440, à Newcastle, County Meath, Irlande, son père, William Welles, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Anne Barnewall, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Christopher Plunkett 2nd Baron of Killeen le 4 janvier 1464, à Crickstown, County Meath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 avril 1506, à Oldcastle, County Meath, Irlande, à l’âge de 65 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Welles am 1. November 1440 in Newcastle, County Meath, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Welles 30 und ihre Mutter Anne Barnewall 25. Sie hat am 4. Januar 1464 in Crickstown, County Meath, Irland Christopher Plunkett 2nd Baron of Killeen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. April 1506 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Oldcastle, County Meath, Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Welles è nata il il 1 novembre 1440 nel Newcastle, County Meath, Irlanda, sua padre, William Welles, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Anne Barnewall, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Christopher Plunkett 2nd Baron of Killeen il 4 gennaio 1464, nel Crickstown, County Meath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figlie. Morì il 26 aprile 1506, nel Oldcastle, County Meath, Irlanda, all'età di 65 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wellesが1440年11月1日にアイルランドコウントイ メアスニューカストルで生まれた時，父William Wellesは30歳，母Anne Barnewallは25歳であった。1464年1月4日にアイルランドコウントイ メアスクリクストウンでChristopher Plunkett 2nd Baron of Killeenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1506年4月26日にアイルランドコウントイ メアスオルドカストルで65歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Welles(이)가 1440년 11월 1일 아일랜드 카운티 미스 뉴카스틀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Welles(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anne Barnewall(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1464년 1월 4일 아일랜드 카운티 미스 크릭스타운에서 Christopher Plunkett 2nd Baron of Killeen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1506년 4월 26일 아일랜드 카운티 미스 드카스틀에서 65세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.1 Nov 1440–April 26, 1506: 1440 оны Арваннэгдүгээр сарын 1–1506 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сарын 26

pt.1 Nov 1440–April 26, 1506: 1 de novembro de 1440–26 de abril de 1506
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Welles nasceu em 1 de novembro de 1440, em Newcastle, County Meath, Irlanda, seu pai, William Welles, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Anne Barnewall, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Christopher Plunkett 2nd Baron of Killeen em 4 de janeiro de 1464, em Crickstown, County Meath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de abril de 1506, em Oldcastle, County Meath, Irlanda, com 65 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Welles родилась 1 ноября 1440 г. в местности нюкастл, коунти мит, Ирландия, её отцу по имени William Welles было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Anne Barnewall, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Christopher Plunkett 2nd Baron of Killeen 4 января 1464 г. в местности криккстоун, коунти мит, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 дочери. Она умерла 26 апреля 1506 г. в местности олдкастл, коунти мит, Ирландия в возрасте 65 лет.

es.1 Nov 1440–April 26, 1506: 1 de noviembre de 1440–26 de abril de 1506
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Welles nació el 1 de noviembre de 1440, en Newcastle, County Meath, Irlanda, su papá, William Welles, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Anne Barnewall, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Christopher Plunkett 2nd Baron of Killeen el 4 de enero de 1464, en Crickstown, County Meath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijas. Murió el 26 de abril de 1506, en Oldcastle, County Meath, Irlanda, a la edad de 65 años.
